Latest Release

GERMAN WEIRD WAR SPIDER TANK

32mm Scale Pre-Supported Weird War

A walking armored nightmare — the Spider Tank brings alternative WWII technology to your tabletop. Part of the growing German Weird War range, designed to work alongside existing Bolt Action and K47 forces.

About

WE MAKE MINIS YOUR PRINTER WANTS TO PRINT

Kyoushuneko Miniatures is a tabletop miniatures creator helping 3D printing hobbyists build and expand their custom armies. We design generic armies that complement your existing collection — every mini is quality sculpted, test printed, and pre-supported so you can just print and play.
